story-agent.comment: Hosted Story Agent MCP over HTTP. WorfGate security headers are required: Bearer token + user-session-id. x-client-id scopes policy resolution.

figma.comment: Official Figma MCP — LOCAL desktop server (loopback only, no external egress). Crew-selected + crew-approved (evaluate_tool_for_crew: figma-mcp-local — 3 approvals, qualityScore 1.00). The REMOTE server (https://mcp.figma.com/mcp) was Worf-vetoed for external-egress / controlled-data leakage. Read-only design→code context feeding the crew's Figma→LCARS scaffold pipeline. REQUIRES the Figma desktop app running with Dev Mode MCP enabled (Figma → Preferences → Enable Dev Mode MCP Server). Scope: non-controlled UI frames only, never sa_*/client data. See docs/figma-design-pipeline.md.

figma-context.comment: GLips Figma-Context-MCP (io.github.GLips/Figma-Context-MCP) — stdio-local, crew-approved (evaluate_tool_for_crew: figma-context-mcp-glips — 3 approvals, qualityScore 1.00, adopt-first per RAG 139). Feeds richer Figma layout data (nodes/constraints/typography/spacing) to geordi's LCARS scaffold pipeline. Auth = a READ-ONLY Figma personal access token (File content: Read) via FIGMA_API_KEY, governed by the WorfGate registry (op figma:read), centralized in ~/.alexai-secrets (NOT ~/.zshrc — the non-interactive crew lane must resolve it), never committed; egress = Figma API only. Set FIGMA_API_KEY, then reconnect (/mcp) to activate. See docs/mcp-candidates-ui-management.md + docs/worfgate-break-glass.md.
